title: Bizzy's Tooltopia
description: Welcome to this tool-based mod! This mod adds many features like: Copper tools + armour, Emerald tools + armour, Rubies, structures, materials like steel, cassete tapes, cash and more!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1NFl7HN5bOE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ijct04dADuc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### **_NOTE: 1.20.1 AND 1.20.6 ARE THE MAIN VERSIONS, ANY OTHER VERSION DOESNT HAVE ALL OF THE FEATURES DUE TO LIMITS_**

This is an action-packed mod filled to the brim with tools, blocks and most importantly Lore...

There are also new mobs like the Trauma and Litty, New Biomes, a new tool type called spears, and many more! 

How to get most of the mod's recipes

If you wanna get most of the mod's recipies you have to make steel which is made by blast smelting iron, thats all you have to do in any version before 2.1, but in future versions and you'll get molten steel, then get ferroaluminum by crafting a Alloyer and putting iron and aluminum in the left and right slots and putting melted silver (melted silver is made by blasting silver and silver is obtained by mining) in the middle (you can also put melted steel but you dont have steel yet so I mean...) Then put the materials you've made in the formation of the image below and you've gotten steel! NOTE: In version 2.1, the Alloyer requires stainless steel to make which requires steel to make, the recipe is changed in 2.1.5, so you've got to get steel from loot and then make the Alloyer, you can also either obtain steel in an earlier update and then update or just wait for the upcoming update.

![Steel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a7bad7d6de5e40c45a9de0db6a81a6487ef7926_0.webp)

Thanks for reading and downloading!

OLD DESCRIPTION:

Welcome to this tool-based mod! This mod adds many features like: Copper tools + armour, Emerald tools + armour, Rubies, structures, materials like steel and gold bars, If you want a list of all features, see below (These are only the features in the first version, check changelog for new stuff):

Steel for better tools, Copper and Emerald tools and armour, Ruby ore, tools and armour, Lab structure, Ruined hut structure, Ruined house structure, Lightspeed potion that gives superspeed, haste 2, speed 3 and jump boost 1, A new music disc in form of a cassette tape, A new food called mashed potato, New advancements, New materials like cement which can be used to make concrete and asphalt, New blocks like asphalt, steel block, ruby blocks and more, New type of tool called "Spears" , Lore And finally, a multitool.

(This is the first mod I made so I'd like feedback in my comments <3 ) (Also available on Planet Minecraft, Curseforge and the MCreator website) (Versions under 1.3 are Curseforge exclusive)

Thanks for reading and downloading!
